characterCraft.note: At 160x360 the courier has a constructed head, coat, arms, gait, facing, weighted bag, a deliberate room-reading scan, pulse posture, alert lean, and delivery pose. Sentries have rotors, antenna, lens, chassis, patrol and coral chase silhouettes, gold cutoff state, and a visibly sparking stun response. Both actor families meet the reference floor.

environmentCraft.note: Vault-steel caps, recessed floor plates, circuit traces, rune seals, relay pedestals, laser gates, grilles, glass runs, pipes, vents, light pools, shadows, and room-name stencils make the facility readable without its HUD. The material density and functional landmarks meet both reference worlds.

levelVariety.note: Each shift is three authored chambers with a different purpose and silhouette: ordered rune room, twin-relay room, and guarded inner vault. Later-shift evidence also loads a different blueprint with new wall islands, gate axes, sight lines, materials, lighting, and landmarks, so progression is structural rather than a palette swap.

animationImpact.note: Aligned captures show courier gait and sentry rotor, bob, scan, cutoff, chase, and stun changes. Rune pressure lights a circuit, the completed seal opens a gate, relays energize the laser grid, the phase pulse throws a broad counter-ring, and lockdown, close-call, loot, and getaway beats all carry anticipation and aftermath.

readability.note: No computed route or breadcrumb line is rendered. Instead, numbered cyan sigils, violet relays, hardwired circuit traces, gate status lamps, a bracketed current interactable, scan posture, gold cases, mint exit, violet patrols, gold cutoffs, and coral chasers communicate intent and threat at native size.

artDirectionCohesion.note: Industrial pixel construction, inset cyan HUD, restrained zone palettes, recurring steel highlights, surveillance motifs, rune-to-circuit grammar, sentry state colors, and gold-coral-cyan payoff language form one authored puzzle-heist identity that clears both reference floors.
